title: Infinite Clouds
description: Clouds extended to the horizon for 1.20.1 and 1.21.1
body:
[FOR THE ORIGINAL VERSION](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extended-clouds)

 

This mod is a 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 port of the _Extended Clouds_ mod by notequalalpha. It allows clouds to extend further into the horizon akin to 1.21.6.

![https://i.imgur.com/XBgMWat.jpeg](https://i.imgur.com/XBgMWat.jpeg)
